prompt: StatsCard.tsx 컴포넌트의 접근성 문제를 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 찾아줘

assertions.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
Detected duplicate id='stat-card' when rendered in a list
Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse
Playwright-target items (A-10) show verdict method as Playwright
